trending_videos.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure 2nd & 3rd Stage (all 11 episodes) will premiere on Netflix each Friday, starting on September 25.

A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.”
As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82181513

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: BLG vs T1 | MSI 2026 |  Bracket Stage Day 2
trending_videos.description:
CALL YOUR SHOT.

The International Competition is ramping up with MSI 2026 in Daejeon, South Korea, at the Daejeon Convention Center.  The Play-In Stage features a 4-team, double-elimination bracket, which qualifies one team into the Bracket Stage— where they will compete against seven other teams. 

To learn more about the MSI format, check out https://riot.com/4o3QR9r

Play-Ins: June 28 - July 1
Bracket Stage: July 3-6 & 8-12
Upper Final: July 9
Lower Final: July 11
Grand Final: July 12

trending_videos.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

trending_videos.title: PV 第2弾　アニメ『スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険』｜2nd Trailer !!　"STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure"
trending_videos.description:
2nd & 3rd STAGE（全11話）2026年9月25日よりNetflixにて毎週金曜日 世界独占先行配信開始予定！
2nd & 3rd STAGE (11 episodes total)Coming to Netflix from September 25, 2026New episodes streaming every Friday, worldwide exclusively on Netflix!

【INTRODUCTION】 
総距離約750マイルの砂漠越え――
ジョニィ・ジョースターとジャイロ・ツェペリが挑むその砂漠には“悪魔の手のひら”と恐れられる土地が存在した。
さらに、不穏な事件が巻き起こり、このレースがただの競技大会ではないことを思い知らされる。
ふたりは様々な思惑が交錯する2nd STAGEへ立ち向かう。
A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles-
the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

videos_without_transcripts.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
videos_without_transcripts.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

examples: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping (2026)
STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix

pop_culture_and_entertainment.insights: Viewers show strong interest in upcoming media releases, suggesting opportunities for content creators to produce review, reaction, and theory videos on popular franchises.

anime_and_gaming.description: Anime and gaming content have notable representation, indicating a strong audience interest in these areas.
examples: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE
anime_and_gaming.insights: Content related to anime and gaming, particularly involving major franchises or events, tends to draw significant attention. Channels could capitalize by creating related content, such as reviews, gameplay, and commentary videos.

music_and_visualizers.description: Music content, particularly visualizers and collaborations, is part of the trending list.
examples: Rylo Rodriguez - Neighborhood Starz (ft. Lil Baby & Kevin Gates) (Visualizer)
music_and_visualizers.insights: Music visualizers and collaborations can capture viewer interest, providing an opportunity for musicians and creators to leverage visual storytelling in their music promotional strategies.

diverse_creator_presence.description: The trending videos feature a variety of creators, each with a unique niche or audience.
diverse_creator_presence.insights: Diverse content strategies are effective, as evidenced by the range of topics covered by trending creators. Channels should focus on their unique strengths and audience interests to maximize engagement.

cross_media_content.description: Content that bridges different media forms, such as movies, anime, and music, is currently popular.
cross_media_content.insights: Creators can explore cross-media content strategies, such as discussing the cultural impact of a series, hosting collaborative discussions, or creating hybrid content that combines elements from different media forms.

event-driven_content.description: Content related to specific events or releases, such as game tournaments and movie premieres, tends to trend.
event-driven_content.insights: Event-driven content strategies could be highly effective. Creators should time their content releases around major events or premieres and engage audiences with timely, relevant discussions or live reactions.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
